title: I'm Herobrine
description: With this mod you can become a Herobrine and spawn lightning bolt
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/kKXjU60aj1g" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

With this mod you can become a Herobrine.You can spawn lightning bolt, give effects Strength, resistance, fire resistance, hero of the village and 10HP!
> If you want become a herobrine this mod is for you!
> 
# Keys
## Spawn lightning bolt:H;
## Give effects:G;
## Clear effects:V
## Fly mode: F

When you create a new world, a Herobrine totem spawns nearby.

> When you are in survival mode you can fly. You can fly when fly mode is ON

# Warning!!
## This mod doesn't change your skin.

You can use this mod in your modpacks
